problem id: f2014638
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  10110001 -> 01101100
  10100011 -> 11101000
  11111111 -> 11111111
  00100111 -> 11001001
  00110100 -> 00001101
  11000100 -> 00110001
  01011011 -> 11010110
  11101110 -> 10111011
  10001010 -> 10100010

query: 01101010
predicted answer: 10011010
